title: dianthus elongatus
intro: Dianthus elongatus, also known as grass pink or fringed pink, is a flowering plant species belonging to the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Dianthus elongatus include its ability to relieve digestive issues and reduce fever, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dianthus elongatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and respiratory issues.
